text: As I stand between glass and screen, I feel curiosity and a sense of displacement. The clean, technological environment draws out questions about innovation, progress, and my place within these walls. Here, surrounded by reflections and abstract ideas, my thoughts wander—how does this space shape me, and how might I shape it in return? There is both excitement and a faint loneliness, as if I am on the threshold of understanding something just out of reach.
